_description: SharpEmu Crash Pattern Database — automatic crash classification rules

patterns.description: A NULL pointer was dereferenced. A game object or HLE return value was not initialized.
suggested_actions: Check which HLE call should have set the NULL register
Look at the first failure in Return Analyzer
Check if any missing NIDs were called before the crash

patterns.description: Game accessed a hardcoded GPU memory address that is not mapped.
suggested_actions: Ensure GPU placeholder memory is mapped at 0x1FE000000
Check if sceKernelMapDirectMemory was called for this range

patterns.description: A host memory address was leaked into guest code. This happens when Marshal.AllocHGlobal addresses are returned to the game.
suggested_actions: Ensure HLE functions use guest memory allocator instead of Marshal.AllocHGlobal

patterns.description: Crash in early game startup code (near _start entry point).
suggested_actions: Check if all critical HLE exports (libc, pthread) are implemented

patterns.description: C++ runtime function is missing. The game's C++ standard library needs this function.
suggested_actions: Implement the missing C++ runtime function
Check if it can delegate to an existing pthread/libc implementation

patterns.description: AGC API was called in wrong order (e.g., RegisterOwner before InitResourceRegistration).
suggested_actions: Or implement the missing initialization call

patterns.description: One or more NIDs were unresolved before the crash. The game may have proceeded with NULL return values.
suggested_actions: Look up the missing NID in aerolib.bin
Implement a stub that returns a reasonable default
Check if the missing function is from libc, libKernel, or libSceAgc
